description:
A Fresh Way to Do Statistics

JASP is a cross-platform software that allows you to conduct statistical analyses in seconds, and without having to learn programming or risking a programming mistake. It aims to be a complete statistical package for both Bayesian and Frequentist statistical methods, that is easy to use and familiar to users of SPSS.
Important fix
- Fix Repeated-Measures Factors in Repeated Measuers ANOVA (https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-desktop/pull/6281, issue: https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-issues/issues/4403)
Update
- Translate desktop help files in Chinese, Japanese, Dutch, French, Spanish, German and Arabic. (https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-desktop/pull/6278)
- Update Learn Bayes Module to fix JAGS issue (https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-desktop/pull/6282)
Full Changelog: https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-desktop/compare/v0.98.0...v0.98.1
